title: Heltec V3 WiFi backhaul: Kconfig and board overlays
description: Update Kconfig in lichen/apps/gateway/Kconfig and board-specific .conf files to properly select and configure WiFi station mode, NET_L2_WIFI_MGMT, prefix delegation dependencies, credentials placeholders (SSID/PASS via Kconfig strings or settings), heap sizes, and any missing NET_* options for 6LBR. Make LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION select required subsystems. Add help text referencing spec/appendix-border-router.md and AGENTS.md init order. Parent of project-LICHEN-sl32.
